subject: enrononline real-time quotes service on reuters

emails.subject: FW: EnronOnline Real-Time Quotes Service on Reuters
emails.subject_base: EnronOnline Real-Time Quotes Service on Reuters
emails.body: FW: EnronOnline Real-Time Quotes Service on Reuters Andy Can you please send me a commercial summary of this deal. I like it but want to know what we are making on it. Thanks! To: Enron Wholesale Services Division Employees@ENRON

emails.subject: RE: EnronOnline Real-Time Quotes Service on Reuters
emails.subject_base: EnronOnline Real-Time Quotes Service on Reuters
emails.body: RE: EnronOnline Real-Time Quotes Service on Reuters John, We are sending our bid and offer prices to Reuters for most US Gas Power products, as well as European Gas and Power, Crude and Refined products, Bandwidth, Coal, Emissions, Weather and Sea Freight. We will receive 75% of all revenue Reuters collects from subscriptions to EnronOnline quotes. It is an evergreen 1 yr contract with mutual termination rights upon 90 days prior notice. We are under no obligations to provide levels of service. Revenue expectations: Reuters will charge, initially, $150/month/desktop. They have 5,000 Energy desktops worldwide. thus with 100% penetration we would get 5,000 x 150 x 12 x .75= $6,750,000; With a more realistic assumption of 50% penetration the yield to Enron would be $3,375,000 p.a. This revenue does not include the incremental benefits, in our view, of branding and standardization of our product and liquidity in the marketplace. In the future I could see us adding a transactable API to the product through Reuters, which would enhance the ease of transaction by Reuters users. If you have any more questions give me a call or drop me a line. AZ

emails.subject: RE: EnronOnline Real-Time Quotes Service on Reuters
emails.subject_base: EnronOnline Real-Time Quotes Service on Reuters
emails.body: Thanks Andy just wanted to know. I also like the concept. To: Sherriff, John
